info.name: GitHub Analyzer API
info.description: A backend service that analyzes GitHub user profiles and stores insights in MySQL.

request.description: Check if the server is running.
Fetch and store a GitHub user's profile insights. Returns status 'fresh' on new data, 'cached' if analyzed within 24 hours.
Returns a summary list of all analyzed GitHub profiles stored in the database.
Returns full stored data for a single analyzed GitHub profile.
